title: Attorney settings — show all 4 landing-page templates (EN funnel, EN AI, ES funnel, ES AI)
brief:
Today the attorney dashboard settings page (`SettingsForm.tsx`) shows 2 preview cards: English AI CaseChecker and Spanish AI CaseChecker. There are actually 4 templates available per attorney:

1. English Funnel — `https://casesdaily.com/c/<slug>` (multi-step quiz; preview with `?preview=1`)
2. English AI CaseChecker — `https://casesdaily.com/c/<slug>/ai` (currently shown)
3. Spanish Funnel — `https://casesdaily.com/c/<slug>/es`
4. Spanish AI CaseChecker — `https://casesdaily.com/c/<slug>/es/ai` (currently shown)

Update the 'Your AI CaseChecker Pages' card (rename to 'Your Landing Pages') in SettingsForm.tsx so all 4 templates are shown in a 2x2 grid, each with iframe preview, copy URL button, and Preview button. Match existing visual treatment (rounded-xl border, gray-50 thumbnail bg, 0.35 scale iframe with gradient fade, EN/ES uppercase pill, Active/Available badge based on language toggle). Funnel cards should be labeled 'Funnel' and AI cards 'AI CaseChecker'. The Spanish cards remain gated on `acceptedLanguages.includes('es')`.

Do not change other parts of SettingsForm.tsx. Only the section between the 'Your AI CaseChecker Pages' heading and the next sibling card.
outputContract:
Markdown: 1. **Plan** (3-5 lines) 2. **Patch** — output the FULL updated SettingsForm.tsx ONLY IF it fits cleanly. Otherwise output ONLY the section to replace, with clear before/after markers: ```tsx // FILE: casesdaily/src/app/dashboard/settings/SettingsForm.tsx#section-landing-pages // REPLACE the existing card from line 865 ('{attorney.slug && (\n
\n

Your AI CaseChecker Pages

') through the matching closing tags with the JSX below: ``` 3. **Verification** — 3 bullets. Keep functional behavior identical for the EN-AI + ES-AI cards (so the user's URL copy + preview buttons work as before). Add the 2 new funnel cards mirroring that pattern but pointing to `/c/` and `/c//es`. The grid becomes sm:grid-cols-2 with 4 cards.
